issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios such as network failures, retries, or handling of robots.txt violations, limiting robustness.
The skill is Python-specific and requires certain libraries, limiting its applicability to agents that can run Python code.

scenarios.name: Paginated catalog scrape with hash dedup and integer-cent prices
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses requests+bs4 and pagination but dedupes by name and stores prices as floats while treatment adds User-Agent/timeout, integer cents, and md5 content-hash dedup with separated extract/transform.

scenarios.name: JS-rendered listings via Playwright + Bright Data residential proxy
scenarios.rationale: Both use headless Playwright with networkidle and a proxy, but treatment hands rendered HTML to BeautifulSoup and uses the exact customer-zone-{zone} auth on brd.superproxy.io:22225.
